zh.Hatfield, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾哈特菲爾德
zh.Great Stambridge, Essex, England: 英國艾可格亞特 斯坦布利其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Grapinel於大約1249年出生在英國艾可拉欽格頓時，他的父親Walter Grapinel25歲，母親Mrs Walter Grapinel24歲。他於大約1276年與Margery在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年之後。

zh-hans.Hatfield, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾哈特菲爾德
zh-hans.Great Stambridge, Essex, England: 英国艾可格亞特 斯坦布利其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Grapinel于大约1249年出生在英国艾可拉欽格頓时，他的父亲Walter Grapinel25岁，母亲Mrs Walter Grapinel24岁。他于大约1276年与Margery在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Grapinel was born about 1249, in Latchingdon, Essex, England, his father, Walter Grapinel, was 25 and his mother, Mrs Walter Grapinel, was 24. He married Margery about 1276, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died after 1295.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Grapinel est né environ 1249, à Latchingdon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Walter Grapinel, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs Walter Grapinel, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margery environ 1276, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé après 1295.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Grapinel um 1249 in Latchingdon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Grapinel 25 und seine Mutter Mrs Walter Grapinel 24. Er hat um 1276 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Margery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb nach 1295.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Grapinel è nato il circa 1249 nel Latchingdon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Walter Grapinel, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Walter Grapinel, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margery circa 1276, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1295.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Grapinelが約1249年にイギリスエセックスラトチングドンで生まれた時，父Walter Grapinelは25歳，母Mrs Walter Grapinelは24歳であった。約1276年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでMargeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Grapinel(이)가 대략 1249년 영국 에세스 라트친그던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Grapinel(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Walter Grapinel(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Margery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Grapinel nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Latchingdon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Grapinel, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Walter Grapinel, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery aproximadamente 1276, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1295.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Grapinel родился около 1249 г. в местности лачингдон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Grapinel было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Walter Grapinel, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery около 1276 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер после 1295 г.

sm.about 1249–after 1295: e tusa o le 1249–ina ua ma'ea le 1295

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Grapinel nació aproximadamente 1249, en Latchingdon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Grapinel, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs Walter Grapinel, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margery aproximadamente 1276, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1295.
